title: Calf exercise device
abstract: The device as disclosed herein is simple and easy to use, and inexpensive to produce. It provides a good calf workout from home for the calf and lower leg. It includes a foot baseplate having a lower curved surface or frame, a series of straps to attach the users foot to the baseplate and an attachment point for a resistance band.
claims: 1. A calf exercise device, comprising: a planar baseplate having an approximate size and shape of a user's foot, said baseplate having a toe region and a heel region and two essentially parallel side edges extending therebetween; a pair of similarly sized and shaped contoured side pieces, each of said contoured side pieces having an upper edge and a lower edge, each of said upper edges attached to one of said parallel side edges, and each of said lower edges having a convex shaped floor contact surface, said convex shaped floor contact surface having an asymmetric shape gradually increasing from the toe region to a peak at a position approximating a position of the ball of said user's foot when said user's foot is positioned on said planar baseplate, and then gradually decreasing from said peak to said heel region, with a rate of said gradual increase being greater than a rate of said gradual decrease; one or more straps affixed to either said parallel side edges of said baseplate or said upper edges of said pair of contoured side pieces, one or more of said one or more straps positioned to extend over one or more of toes, arch or heel of said user's foot; and a notch formed in said pair of contoured side pieces, said notch sized and configured to cooperate with a resistance band, wherein said notch is positioned in said region of said user's toes and said convex shaped floor contact surface is positioned in a region of said user's arch when said user's foot is positioned on said planar baseplate.
